description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular green plot with a flat roof and minimalist white exterior walls. The structure features large horizontal windows and a combination of open and enclosed spaces, with visible interior furnishings such as a dining table and kitchen. The property is surrounded by a manicured lawn, several trees, and a driveway with parked cars, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The main entrance is marked by a glass door and a sheltered area, while the rear and side facades have fewer openings and more privacy. The landscaping includes both decorative and shade trees, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open space, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping, set on a green lawn with a driveway and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a large window, and a person standing near the door, with a car parked on the driveway and trees on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of trees along the facade, two cars parked on the driveway, and a glimpse into the open-plan interior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and more of the green lawn with cars and trees providing shade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway with three cars, a large tree, and the solid side wall of the bungalow with minimal window openings.
